name: Meeting Intelligence → Evaluation Flow
description: Canonical orchestration flow for routing a finalized MeetingMinutesRecord from the meeting intelligence module through evaluation and into the work item control loop when action is required.

stages.name: Minutes to Evaluation
stages.description: Transfer the finalized MeetingMinutesRecord from meeting_intelligence to control_plane.evaluation for structured outcome assessment.

stages.name: Evaluation to Work Item (conditional)
stages.description: When evaluation sets action_required=true, route the EvaluationResult to control_plane.work_items to open a work item. This stage is skipped when action_required is false.

notes: This flow covers the canonical meeting intelligence → evaluation → work item path. The second stage is conditional on the evaluation outcome. This is the reference implementation of the platform control loop.
